21ace2bc7429.title: Publish opening hours — you're invisible to 'open now' searches
21ace2bc7429.description: No opening hours listed. Every customer filtering by 'open now' on Google Maps will never see you. This takes 2 minutes to fix.
21ace2bc7429.management_implication: This is a zero-effort, high-impact fix.

5ac0b7bc1db8.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
5ac0b7bc1db8.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
5ac0b7bc1db8.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

db195c303556.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
db195c303556.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

fb9f07f39b89.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
fb9f07f39b89.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
fb9f07f39b89.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

2c483924f5cf.title: Ranked #12 of 18 locally — peers are ahead
2c483924f5cf.description: At percentile 35.3, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

94399258de00.title: Harder to book/find than competitors — friction losing customers
94399258de00.description: You trail peers by 2.0 points on conversion. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.
